mapper.insert: insert into addresses( user_id, address_name, recipient_name, phone, zipcode, address, detail_address, is_default ) values(#{user_id}, #{address_name}, #{recipient_name}, #{phone}, #{zipcode}, #{address}, #{detail_address}, #{is_default} )
mapper.select: select * from addresses where user_id = #{user_id} and is_default = "true"
mapper.update: update addresses SET is_default = 'false' where user_id = #{user_id}
